title: Youtube poop: Quiet Mountain
description:
OK this poop was cause by a bet I made on accident with Xuchilbara on the youchewpoop forums. what happened was I was on a small thread and Xuchilbara who is known as "superbork" on youtube and he hade somthing written on his sig (im not going to say what it said and you should not say anything about it to Xuchilbara) that kinda was making fun of me (dont get me wrong Xu im your friend) he would not remove it when I ask him to so I made a deal that I would make a Tribute poop on his most favorite thing which happens to be quiet mountain.
this was a very hard thing to poop it took me a while and I hope you and Xu enjoy it as much as I enjoyed taking breaks from it XD
I would like to thank Arufonzu for a few of the Ideas and help she gave on the forums to helping me finish this movie faster
